layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-24. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding p-6 or p-8.
layout_strategies.grid: Bento/Tetris Grid. Never equal columns. Use col-span-2 vs col-span-1 for visual interest.
layout_strategies.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for Pricing cards.

SlabCard.description: A pure CSS implementation of a graded sports card (PSA/BGS style).
SlabCard.instructions: Do not use an image. Build a container with 'rounded-xl', thick transparent border (the plastic case), a top header (the grade label), and an inner image area. Add a subtle 'holographic' gradient overlay.

Pricing.details: Two cards: Rookie (Free) vs Hall of Fame (Pro). Pro card should have a glowing blue border.

Auth.background: Subtle grid pattern + radial gradient spotlight.

visual_enhancers.gradients: No full screen gradients. Use mesh gradients only in small 'orbs' behind glass elements.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to prevent banding.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid.
